sectiondef.header: Vendor Specific InfoFrame Field Masks and Shifts.

briefdescription.para: No additional HDMI video format is presented.
3D structure definitions as defined in the HDMI 1.4a specification
Sub-sampling positions for the sub-sampling methods.
3D Preferred 2D View - Indicates which view is preferred for 2D viewing.
This function parses a Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Rx_Aux instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during parsing

briefdescription.para: This function generates a Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Tx_Aux instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during generation

briefdescription.para: This function generates a HDMI fourm Vendor Specific InfoFrame (HF-VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Tx_Aux instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during generation

briefdescription.para: This function displays the contents of an XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiC_VSIF instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiC_3D_Struct_Field.
This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Method.
This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiC_3D_Sampling_Position.
